title: AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN REGARDING PUBLIC WORKS PROJECTS FOR THE PROVINCE OF ILOILO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4786 / 58 OG No. 15, 3101 (April 9, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3295, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN REGARDING PUBLIC WORKS PROJECTS FOR THE PROVINCE OF ILOILO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Priority No. 23, page 43-B and Priorities Nos. 30 and 33, page 44, group III, for the Province of Iloilo, Appendix B, Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen, are hereby amended to read as follows:

"23. Janiuay (Elementary) .. Tolarucan .. Completion .. P3,000.00

"30. Janiuay........................Poblacion .. Repair ...... 4,000.00

"3. Leon (High School) ....Poblacion .. Repair ...... 6,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
